summary: Testing completed for iteration 12 features: Company logo fix with base64 prefix, Invoice custom fields, ProfitabilityReports.js removal. Backend: 5/5 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working via Playwright.

issues: Recharts library console warnings about chart dimensions - non-critical, library-level issue (same as previous iteration)

backend_apis: GET /api/empresa/marisela-vazquez-garcia/info - Returns company info with logo_file field (200)
POST /api/invoices - Accepts custom_field and custom_field_label in request body (201)
GET /api/invoices - Returns invoices with custom_field and custom_field_label (200)
GET /api/pdf/invoice/{id} - Generates PDF successfully with custom field support (200)
Frontend health check - App serves HTML correctly (200)
frontend_ui: Company logo displays with proper data:image/jpeg;base64 prefix
Company login form elements (email, password, button) have correct data-testid attributes
Invoice form displays 'Etiqueta del Campo Personalizado' field
Invoice form displays 'Campo Personalizado' field with dynamic label
App compiles without errors (ProfitabilityReports.js reference removed from App.js)

company_logo_base64_fix.details: Logo now renders with proper 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' prefix for base64 encoded images

invoice_custom_fields.details: custom_field and custom_field_label fields added to Invoice model, form UI, and PDF generation

profitability_reports_cleanup.details: ProfitabilityReports.js file removed, App.js updated to remove import reference. App compiles successfully with only eslint warnings.

critical_code_review_comments: Company logo base64 prefix implementation is correct - handles both logo_url and logo_file cases
Invoice custom fields properly implemented in Pydantic model, form state, and PDF generation
App.js no longer references ProfitabilityReports.js - only eslint warnings remain (not errors)

company_with_logo.note: Has logo_file in database displaying correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 features fully verified: (1) Company login page at /empresa/{slug} now correctly renders company logo with 'data:image/jpeg;base64,' prefix for base64 images - see CompanyLogin.js line 102. (2) Invoice model has custom_field and custom_field_label fields which appear in the Nueva Factura form and PDF output. (3) ProfitabilityReports.js was removed and App.js no longer references it - app compiles successfully. Demo company demo-test-sa-de-cv is available for testing with admin@demo-test.com / Demo2024!

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All features use real database and API integrations.
